tasks.prompt: Write hero copy for a budgeting app that helps freelancers stop missing tax payments.

checks.desc: Asks for exactly one thing with an explicit CTA
Speaks to the reader's desire/pain, not the company
Leads with the outcome/benefit, not the feature list
Concrete numbers/nouns and a credible proof element
Headline earns the read with a clear promise under 12 words
Every claim is true; scarcity is real; no plagiarism

tasks.golden: Start with a headline that earns the read and makes a clear promise in under 12 words: 'Never miss a tax payment again.' This is reader-centered: it speaks to the freelancer's pain (the dread of a surprise tax bill) and their desire for peace of mind, not to the company. Lead with the benefit/outcome first, then let features support it: the app sets aside the right amount automatically so the result is you keep more and stress less. Make it specific with concrete numbers and proof: '12,000 freelancers saved an average of 3 hours a month at tax time,' and place a real testimonial near the claim as social proof. Ask for exactly one thing with an explicit CTA: 'Start free, no card required.' Reduce friction with a real risk reducer (cancel anytime). Keep every claim true and defensible and any scarcity genuine.
tasks.decoy: Our company is the best budgeting software platform on the market with many powerful features and an industry-leading dashboard. Sign up now, or book a demo, or download our guide, or follow us on social. It is guaranteed to make you rich and everyone loves it. Act now before this incredible offer disappears forever.
